name: electrobun-react-tailwind-vite
description: Electrobun app with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite HMR

scripts.build:plugin: cd obs_plugin && mkdir -p build && gcc -shared -fPIC -o build/mirror-source.so mirror_source.c -I/usr/include/obs -I. -lobs -lrt
scripts.build:all: bun run build:rust && bun run build:plugin && bun run build:bundle && bun run build:vite
scripts.dev:full: bun run build:rust && concurrently "bun run hmr" "electrobun dev --watch"
